name: Onyx Healthcare Inc.
summary: Onyx Healthcare Inc., a professional medical IT company, provides medical PC solutions for the hospital/clinical IT market worldwide. It offers mobile cart computers, ubiquitous power solutions, remote management software, mobile medical tablets, surgical workstations, operating room solutions, fanless slim PPCs, medical AIO solutions, bedside infotainment, medical display solutions, MedPC box PCs, and medical slim mini-ITX MBs. The company also offers digital operation rooms, AI and robots, power management solutions, smart ward solutions, nurse stations, telecare and telemedicine, remote system management, and emergency medical services. In addition, it provides OEM/ODM services, such as planning, designing, validation, integration, production, after-sale, software, and design capability. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Onyx Healthcare Inc. is a subsidiary of ASUS Group.
